response.justification: The candidate has nearly 17 years of professional software engineering experience with genuine breadth across stacks and domains, and shows entrepreneurial drive through founding GISCollective and contributing open source tooling. However, the role is a Director-level IC position centered on deep AI expertise and strategic customer advisory work. The candidate's AI involvement is limited to a brief description in the most recent role (April 2025–present), with no shipped AI products, platforms, or recognized expertise demonstrated. There is no evidence of advising strategic partners, influencing organizational AI adoption, or operating at the scope this position requires.
strengths: 17+ years of professional engineering across diverse stacks and domains satisfies the minimum experience threshold with margin
Founded and operates GISCollective as a real product used by external organizations, demonstrating entrepreneurial follow-through beyond the idea stage
Consistent knowledge-sharing track record via public conference talks, multi-day workshops, and widely used open source libraries shows communication and external influence capability
concerns: AI experience is shallow and very recent — mentioned only briefly in the current role (April 2025–present) with no shipped AI products, published research, or recognized platforms as evidence
No demonstrated Director-level strategic work: advising enterprise customers, shaping cloud product roadmaps, or driving AI adoption strategy at organizational or industry scale
Cloud depth is limited to AWS CDK usage in one role; no cloud architecture, platform strategy, or provider-level expertise aligned with the role's cloud-and-AI mandate

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI depth and track record
No strategic advisory or Director-level scope evidence
Meets years-of-experience minimum with entrepreneurial background
